name: American Trading Company
description_short: Cincinnati-based buyer and pawn shop specializing in precious metals, rare coins, jewelry, diamonds, and firearms with 50+ years of experience across 2 locations.
description_long:
American Trading Company is an established precious metals and collectibles buyer based in Cincinnati, Ohio, with over 50 years of industry experience. The company operates two physical locations on W. Galbraith Road and Harrison Avenue, serving the Greater Cincinnati area as a full-service trade shop.

The company offers a comprehensive range of buying, selling, trading, and pawning services. They purchase and sell scrap gold, silver, and platinum jewelry; rare coins (U.S., foreign, and ancient); diamonds and watches; guns and ammunition; and bullion. They advertise wholesale pricing on inventory, meaning customers can buy items at reduced prices. The business has recently expanded its pawn lending services, offering cash loans against collateral in addition to outright purchases.

American Trading Company differentiates itself through its longevity and multi-service model. Rather than specializing in a single category like coins or guns, they operate as a generalist precious metals and collectibles dealer. They offer free verbal quotes in-store and have partnered with Davidson's to provide online gun purchasing with in-store pickup options. Their messaging emphasizes willingness to evaluate items customers believe may have no value.

While the company appears legitimate and established, potential customers should note that pawn and precious metals businesses are inherently subjective in valuation. The "wholesale prices" advertised when buying from customers may mean significantly lower offers than retail resale value. The recent addition of pawn lending services suggests they are expanding beyond pure buying/selling into short-term cash lending, which carries different consumer protections and risks.
pros: 50+ years of operating experience in precious metals and collectibles
Two convenient Cincinnati locations with free in-person quotes
Comprehensive service model: buys, sells, trades, and pawns items
Wholesale pricing available for customer purchases of gold, jewelry, diamonds, and bullion
Expanded services now include pawn loans for quick cash
Partnerships with major retailers (Davidson's) for firearms purchasing and in-store pickup
Accepts wide variety of items including rare coins, watches, and firearms
cons: As a precious metals buyer, offers are typically well below retail resale value due to wholesale pricing structure
Valuations are subjective and based on spot prices and market demand; customers may receive different quotes from competitors
Pawn lending services carry standard pawn risks including interest costs, storage fees, and potential loss of collateral if loans aren't repaid
Website does not disclose pawn loan terms, APR, or fee structures
Limited to 2 physical locations in Cincinnati area; not accessible to most U.S. consumers
best_for: Cincinnati-area residents needing quick cash against collateral or looking to sell precious metals and collectibles
Gun owners seeking to buy, sell, or trade firearms locally with in-store pickup options
Individuals with rare coins or bullion seeking local buyers without shipping valuable items nationally
People needing short-term cash loans secured by jewelry, watches, or other valuables
diagnosis: American Trading Company is best for Cincinnati-area residents who need quick cash against collateral or want to sell precious metals, coins, firearms, or jewelry locally. The main caveat is that as a pawn and precious metals buyer, they will offer wholesale rates significantly below what items might sell for at retail, and pawn loans carry interest and fees that should be carefully reviewed before borrowing.
services: Purchase and sale of scrap gold and gold jewelry
Buying and selling of silver and platinum items
Rare coin appraisal, purchase, and sale (U.S., foreign, and ancient coins)
Diamond and watch buying and selling
Firearms and ammunition buying, selling, and trading
Free verbal quotes at physical locations
Online gun purchasing through Davidson's partnership with in-store pickup
Paper money and currency buying and selling
